title: Surgeon Vacancy at Vijaya Diagnostics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Vijaya Diagnostics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Vijaya Diagnostics in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vijaya Diagnostics:
Vijaya Diagnostics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijaya Diagnostics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
